query_normalized: statistical analysis of publicly available covid-19 vaccine adverse event reports statistics
rationale: The paper focuses on the statistical methodology and reporting of efficacy results from a controlled Phase 3 clinical trial, which is a distinct domain from the user's question regarding the analysis of passive surveillance data (adverse event reports) from the general population. It does not measure the same variables, mechanisms, or empirical populations (controlled trial participants vs. public reporting system data) required for inclusion under the provided criteria.
